title: gynura divaricata
intro: Gynura divaricata, also known as purple passion or bungu-bungu, is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gynura divaricata include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and potentially lowering cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
